name: 研究问题（RQ）
subject: ee
domain_name: 研究设计 / Research Design / Research Design
curriculum_points: Students will formulate a clear, focused, and arguable research question that is appropriate for an in-depth, 4000-word academic investigation within their chosen subject.
Students will refine their initial research question through preliminary reading to ensure it is manageable, specific, and conducive to critical analysis and argument.
